title: 'Achiyram #0297
definition:
Ahiram = "my brother is exalted" or "brother or (the) lofty"

 1) a Benjamite, son of Benjamin
nasbUsage:

 1) a Benjamite, son of Benjamin

    NASB:  brother of (the) lofty, a son of Benjamin
